content.summary: Setting a fixed seed on Noise TOP produces deterministic output, essential for reproducible generative art. Without a seed, the noise changes on every cook, making it impossible to recreate a specific visual.

recipe.description: Set the Noise TOP seed parameter to a fixed integer value instead of leaving it at 0 (random).
steps: Set par.seed to a fixed value (e.g., 42)
The output is now deterministic and reproducible across sessions

skillUpdateProposal.proposedAddition: ✅ **Noise TOP Seed for Reproducible Generative Art** — Setting a fixed seed on Noise TOP produces deterministic output, essential for reproducible generative art. Without a seed, the noise changes on every cook, making it impossible to recreate a specific visual.

title: Noise TOP Seed for Reproducible Generative Art
